etimesVideo inside: Auto-rickshaw in London goes viral, reminds Indians of home instantlyA short video from London is gaining attention online. It shows an auto-rickshaw driving alongside other vehicles on a London road. This unexpected sight has resonated with many, especially Indians. The clip brings back memories of everyday life in India. It offers a familiar touch in a foreign setting. The video has sparked conversations and shared experiences among viewers.

etimesMarch 2026 rains: How will the Western Disturbance impact the standing Rabi crop? Is it beneficial or harmful?Unseasonal rains and snow in northern India are threatening the Rabi crop harvest, particularly wheat, as western disturbances bring pre-monsoon showers. These storms can flatten crops, cause rot, and lead to significant losses, potentially increasing food prices and pest problems. This weather pattern highlights the growing impact of climate change on agricultural livelihoods.

etimesWho is Nabeel Gabol? The alleged Pakistani politician behind Dhurandhar's character Jameel JamaliDhurandhar 2's massive success has sparked a stir, with Pakistani politician Nabeel Gabol finding himself in the spotlight. Initially enjoying the resemblance to his character Jameel Jamali, Gabol is now reportedly in a panic as the film portrays Jamali as an Indian spy. Netizens are having a field day, trolling the politician online.
